name: node-fortawesome-fontawesome-free

summary: The iconic font, CSS, and SVG framework
description:
The iconic font, CSS, and SVG framework
Font Awesome is the Internet's icon library and toolkit, used by
millions of designers, developers, and content creators.
.
This package provides FontAwesome icons in various format.
